message:
update(cli): add criterion benchmark dependency to lockfile and expand showcase content

- Regenerate Cargo.lock with criterion and its transitive dependencies
  following the fm-cli benchmark harness addition
- Expand demo showcase HTML with additional content sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
